raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (centered on table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the darker box; the side regions are unobstructed and there is sufficient clearance from the table edges to apply inward squeeze and lift without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors via lateral pinch support and is lifted off the tabletop, under the robot's control."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the darker box; the side regions are unobstructed and there is sufficient clearance from the table edges to apply inward squeeze and lift without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors via lateral pinch support and is lifted off the tabletop, under the robot's control.
